title: Netlab Consolidated JSON Cache Schema
description: Schema for validating consolidated JSON cache files created by netlab consolidate

version.description: Schema version of the consolidated cache

topology_file.description: Path to the original topology file that was consolidated

files.description: Dictionary mapping file paths to their content

content.description: Parsed YAML content as a dictionary/object

package.description: Whether this is a package file (package: prefix)

file_count.description: Number of files in the cache
